title: Intune App Supersedence
description: Intune Win32 app supersedence configuration. Array of up to 10 supersedence relationships (Graph API limit). Located at windows/intune/supersedence.json in each title repo.

supersededAppId.description: Intune App ID (GUID) of the application being superseded.

supersedenceType.description: 'update' uninstalls the previous version before installing. 'replace' keeps both versions side-by-side.
